steps.text: Let's write some animal names! Find a farm animal and trace it.

steps.feedback: Cow! Short and simple — three letters.

steps.text: Now find dog and trace it!
steps.feedback: Dog! Your fingers know that one well.
Duck! Four letters — well done.

steps.text: Now find cat and trace it!
steps.feedback: Cat! Three letters, just like cow.

steps.text: Last one — find horse and trace it!
steps.feedback: Horse! Five letters — your longest word so far.

text: You traced five animal names! Brilliant!

steps.text: These animals live in wild places far away. Let's write their names!

steps.feedback: Lion! Four letters for a mighty animal.
Tiger! Five letters — and very stripy.
Zebra! Five letters with a Z — rare letter!
Camel! Five letters — they live in the desert.
Turtle! Six letters — your longest yet.

text: Five wild animals — you wrote them all!

steps.text: Feelings have names — and now we're going to write them!

steps.feedback: Sad. Three letters. Everyone feels sad sometimes.
Shy! Just three letters — a quiet little word.
Smile! Five letters and a happy feeling.
Angry. Five letters for a big feeling.
Worried! Seven letters — your biggest word today.

text: You wrote five feeling words! Brilliant!

steps.text: Yum! Let's write the names of some fruits.

steps.feedback: Apple! Five letters — starts with a.
Pear! Four letters — shaped like a teardrop.
Kiwi! Four letters — green and tangy inside.
Mango! Five letters — sweet and orange inside.
Lemon! Five letters — very sour!

text: Five fruits — you wrote them all!

steps.text: Vroom! Let's write the names of things that go!

steps.feedback: Bus! Just three letters — short and fast.
Train! Five letters — it travels on rails.
Truck! Five letters — carries heavy loads.
Digger! Six letters — scoops up earth.
Tractor! Seven letters — your longest word today.

text: Vroom! You wrote five vehicle names!
